headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on Trane Technologies, Raises Price Target to $476
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Patrick Baumann   maintains Trane Technologies (NYSE:TT) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $460 to $476.

headline: Trane Technologies (NYSE:TT) Passes the Caviar Cruise Quality Investing Screen
summary: Trane Technologies passes the Caviar Cruise quality stock screener with strong revenue and EBIT growth, high ROIC, and low debt. A premium valuation is balanced by exceptional profitability and financial health.
